feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I Will Follow You To Infinity And Beyond
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,491Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 5

Summary: Eddie startled awake, the icy tendrils of his nightmare still clinging to him, and the shift beside him roused Buck from sleep. "What's wrong?" Buck's voice, thick with sleep, murmured. Buck felt Eddie's fear, a palpable shiver in the dark, and his arms instinctively tightened around him. "There is no place so far my love cannot reach you, Eddie Diaz. I will follow you to the doorstep of Eternity itself and never tire of the chase. You are my beginning and my ending. Do not be afraid, I will let nothing part us again. I would drain the Great Slipstream itself if it dared to claim you." Eddie planted a kiss on Buck's forehead, a profound gratitude blooming in his chest for his soulmate's unwavering presence. "Okay, Superman," Eddie chuckled softly. or;After Buck is separated from Eddie by a shotgun, he is reborn in a new world and creates a whole religion just to have Eddie reincarnate and be safe and happy again with him. He also does cool magic as a by-the-way. 😍😍

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: The Firefighter Exchange Program
entry.summary:
Author: SarInTheStars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,045Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 7

Summary: “As I’m sure you know, we’ve been working on a much-needed city-wide reformation of the NYPD and the FDNY. I’ve been tasked with finding an innovative way to move our firefighters into this next chapter," Chief Strand tells them. “Respectfully, sir, what does that have to do with us?” Eddie asks when it seems like the others aren’t going to. “I’m developing a Firefighter Exchange Program with a pilot run happening this summer. We’ll take two firefighters from a dozen major cities and swap them in for 8 weeks. Your crew is the first I thought of.” Eddie doesn’t need more than a second to consider. “I’ll do it.” OR A summer in NYC is exactly what Buck and Eddie need after a year of loss and grief. With Chris attending a Science Program in Brooklyn, Buck and Eddie participate in the NYC Firefighter Exchange Program and learn more about themselves than they expect. From getting to know a whole new team, to reconnecting with old friends, to attending the NYC Pride March - they've got an entire summer ahead of them to figure things out.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the plant on the windowsill (and other things that grow)
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,180Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Buck knows Theo loves Eddie. What he tries very hard not to think about is how much he loves Eddie too. A bedtime crisis, a late-night visit to the 118, and one unexpectedly domestic morning later, Buck finds himself running out of reasons not to say the things he’s been keeping to himself for years. Or, the one where Theo gets his goodnight, and Buck gets everything he’s always wanted.

entry.title: I watched you fall, and I did nothing.(He couldn't even call for help.)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiecokkieta

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,244Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 96

Summary: After the team's private lives were laid bare—and after Buck, realizing he had hurt his family in a way he never could have foreseen, withdrew his lawsuit—what transpired at the grocery store, and everything that followed... Happy endings aren't really my thing—I mean, I think they'll get over this lawsuit business pretty quickly.

entry.title: Let's Get Married Again
entry.summary:
Author: BuddieCanonTonight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,974Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 6

Summary: “I’m not going to run away and start dating a woman,” Eddie reassured. “Good, because it would lead to a divorce this time Edmundo,” Buck stated as seriously as he could between the giggles trying to break loose. “Just try and divorce me Evan, I’ll break every pen in the world to stop the papers from being signed,” Eddie replied in complete sincerity - no laughter or teasing tone - he was determined to keep Buck forever. OR After Buck and Eddie attempt to be platonically married, they realize they loved each other all along. But can their love survive facing the mistakes of their past and Buck's intense feelings about table cloth colours and pocket squares?

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 300,113Chapters: 62/?Kudos: 126

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,505Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

entry.title: to live for the hope of it all
entry.summary:
Author: opiumashes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,504Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8,827

Summary: Eddie freezes at the doorway, tray in hand, the voices drifting from inside stopping him cold. “Oh, your stepdad doesn’t live with you?” Mark asks, gesturing to a framed photo of Buck and Christopher. There’s a beat of silence—too long, too loaded.Eddie’s heart stutters, thudding hard against his ribs as he waits, breath held. God's really decided to test him today. Then Christopher answers, casually, like it’s the easiest thing in the world. “No… he lives in L.A.”or Eddie overhears a conversation between Christopher and his friend, then proceeds to spiral about being in love with Buck while also being insanely jealous of 118's new recruit

entry.title: high cortisol
entry.summary:
Author: lindraice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,490Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 172

Summary: "You, uh, you ever heard of—of a prostate massage?" Buck asked. He had his hand resting on Eddie's shoulder now, with Eddie still holding onto his wrist. Eddie huffed out a laugh best he could. "Don't tell me you learned that in, uh, in Peru." He said, trying to keep his voice light and joking as if it would dispell the tense air lighting up the room. As if it could hide the way he felt himself twitch in his briefs hearing Buck say prostate massage. Buck smiled, not quite laughing as he replied. "No, that one is from other sources." He said. "Really good for stress relief, though. Tried and true." Eddie shifted underneath Buck, feeling the stiff flagpole tucked away in his pants. He was leaking steadily now, the front of his underwear damp and sticking to him uncomfortably. He let go of Buck's wrist, bringing his hands up to sit underneath his head while he arched his back ever-so-slightly up towards Buck. "If you think it'll help." He says, hoarse and much more sultry than he meant. OR the platonic prostate massage fic

entry.title: drowning on dry land
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,315Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 373

Summary: Alright, now to prove he’s right. Finger on the cursor, Buck types an a to start. Google, in all its autocomplete glory, gives Buck some options. Four suggestions stack top to bottom in whatever order Google decides matters most on any given evening, and the four that come up under Buck's single letter are, in order: am i gay quiz (visited 2 days ago) Amazon (visited 5 days ago) american airlines ammonia bleach mix Buck stops chewing the inside of his cheek — which, honestly, he didn’t even realize he was doing. That’s — huh. That’s not what he was expecting at all. Or,Buck uses Eddie's laptop and sees something he isn't supposed to see. He reacts accordingly.

entry.title: let me in, hold me close
entry.summary:
Author: lesmiserablol

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,321Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: “What is all this?” Eddie asks. “When did you get a telescope?” “Oh, years ago. Remember Christopher’s astronomy phase in sixth grade? We never had a chance to set it up, I honestly forgot about it until I moved here and Maddie said I had to stop storing everything in her garage. I’ve been waiting for the perfect night to set it up, and here we are!” “You…” Eddie frowns, mind racing. “Wait, you got this for Chris?” “Of course I did. I’m just sorry that we never got the chance to use it before,” Buck says. “Better late than never, right?”(or, stargazing in Buck's backyard, but Eddie would rather look at Buck)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: When the Sirens Stop
entry.summary:
Author: trinbuckleydiaz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,094Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Buck never expected a community barbecue for first responders to change his life. As a dispatcher, he knows the voices of hundreds of firefighters, paramedics, and police officers. Some he knows better than others. One voice, in particular, has become a familiar part of his shifts. Eddie Diaz never expected to recognize a stranger by the sound of his voice. One conversation leads to exchanged numbers, late-night texts, and a friendship neither of them saw coming. Somewhere between long shifts, radio calls, and the quiet moments after the sirens stop, Buck and Eddie find themselves becoming something more. Or: Dispatch Buck meets Firefighter Eddie at a barbecue, and neither of them is prepared for what happens next.

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,906Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 271

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: The Colors We Carry
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,443Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: "I guess I’m asking if you’d want to go with me?” Eddie’s eyes shift to the floor, then back at him. Before he can say anything, he interjects, “Never mind. It’s silly. You’re straight, there’d be no reason for you to—” “Yes.” Buck blinks a few times in disbelief. “You–yes?” Eddie nods, firm and sure. “Yes. You’re not going alone because I’m coming with you.”
